markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore a potential investment and commercial partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Pitch:** GrowthX is a "services as software" agency that uses an internal AI platform to scale high-quality content creation for both traditional SEO and the emerging AI search (GEO) paradigm.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**The Differentiator:** The platform's "experts in the loop" model combines AI efficiency with human oversight, using client-specific "artifacts" (e.g., ICPs, brand voice) to ensure content quality and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**The Opportunity:** Liberty Global (LG) is exploring a dual-track partnership: a strategic investment via its Tech Ventures team and a commercial opportunity to deploy GrowthX across its portfolio brands (e.g., Virgin Media, Formula E).](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**The Ask:** A follow-up meeting with Marcel Santilli (founder) is needed to discuss the investment thesis, product roadmap (Atlas, Check That), and the commercial partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

## Topics

### Liberty Global: Context for the Partnership

  - [**Structure:** A multinational TMT holding company (telecom, media, tech) with over $3B AUM in its venture arm.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Portfolio Brands:** Virgin Media, O2, Telenet, Formula E, Formula 1, TripAdvisor.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Investment Mandate:** Takes strategic investment positions and helps portfolio companies grow by becoming a customer and making introductions across its brand family.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Call Origin:** An intro from Madrona suggested a dual opportunity for LG: an investment and a commercial partnership to help GrowthX access LG's brands.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### GrowthX: The "Services as Software" Model

  - [**Mission:** Help brands become publishers by creating high-quality content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Core Offering:** End-to-end content creation (strategy, publishing, LLM monitoring) for both traditional SEO and AI search (GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Engagement Model:** An 8-week strategy sprint followed by a 12-month growth execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Team:** Combines AI workflows with human expertise, including a Chief Content Officer (former TechCrunch EIC) and SEO leads from TripAdvisor and SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Competitive Stance:** Views itself as an agency alternative, not a competitor to workflow tools like Profound or AirOps.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

### The GrowthX Platform: "Atlas"

  - [**Function:** An internal "content OS" that enables the "experts in the loop" model.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** Client-specific documents (e.g., ICPs, brand voice) that provide AI with essential context.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Agentic Pipelines:** Workflows that run in a loop until a quality threshold is met.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Research Engine:** Synthesizes info from multiple sources (Tavli, EXA, Anthropic, OpenAI) and stores it in a knowledge graph for future retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** Editors can inspect and modify any step in the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [**Product Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Atlas:** Will be opened to clients in the future.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Check That:** A Profound competitor launching Jan/Feb 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Client Examples

  - [**Augment Code:** Established the company as an expert in enterprise AI coding through editorial content, tool comparisons, and thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Ramp:** Created a programmatic vendor directory using Ramp's internal spend data, enabling the company to rank for searches like "Airtable vs. ClickUp."](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**Webflow:** Built integration pages and definitions for technical terms.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Lovable:** Created a templates library using the client's API to automatically generate and optimize presentation templates.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ankur Prakash & Bobbie Maltiel:** Schedule a follow-up meeting with Marcel Santilli to discuss the investment thesis, product roadmap, and commercial partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/RTq16NZeQ-DM_8Y8G58urmAsqCiNLTTM?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
